title: Work-Items Full v2 Cutover — all 12 v2 REST endpoints against vector_artefacts
scope: Implement all 11 missing v2 work-items endpoints against the vector_artefacts database and switch the frontend to use them. Six-task rollout: Task 1 adds the artefact_number_sequence table (migration 016) for atomic number allocation on Create; Task 2 adds v2 read endpoints (Get, ListChildren, Summary, FlowStates) to the Go service and handler; Task 3 adds v2 write service methods (CreateWorkItem, PatchWorkItem, ArchiveWorkItem, BulkOps); Task 4 adds write handlers, field-value handlers (List, Upsert, Delete), and registers all 12 routes in main.go; Task 5 switches the frontend from /api/work-items to /api/v2/work-items across four files; Task 6 closes out plan docs.
value: PLA-0023 only wired the read-list endpoint (GET /api/v2/work-items). PLA-0025 completes the v2 surface so every work-items operation the frontend needs — create, patch, archive, bulk-ops, field values, flow states — is served from vector_artefacts, not the legacy mmff_vector.obj_* tables. After this plan the frontend is fully on v2 and the v1 obj_work_items path is an unused fallback ready for drop.
implementation_plan: Task 1 — Migration 016: artefact_number_sequence table for atomic per-(subscription, artefact_type) number allocation.
Task 2 — v2 read service methods + handlers: GetWorkItem, ListChildren, SummariseWorkItems, ListFlowStates; routes GET /{id}, GET /summary, GET /flow-states, GET /{id}/children.

Task 3 — v2 write service methods: CreateWorkItem (with number allocation + workspace resolution), PatchWorkItem (dynamic SET builder), ArchiveWorkItem (soft delete), BulkOps (per-row partial-failure transaction).
Task 4 — v2 write handlers + field-value service + handlers + routes: POST /, PATCH /{id}, DELETE /{id}, POST /bulk, GET+PUT+DELETE /{id}/field-values.
Task 5 — Frontend switch: replace /api/work-items with /api/v2/work-items across work-items-tree-config.tsx, WorkItemDetailPanel.tsx, useWorkItemFlowStates.ts, and work-items/page.tsx.
Task 6 — Plan housekeeping: PLA-0025.json, c_plan_index.md, c_scope.md.
areas_impacted: Backend (Go, modified): backend/internal/workitemsv2/service.go — 9 new service methods; backend/internal/workitemsv2/handler.go — 11 new HTTP handlers + jsonErrBody helper; backend/cmd/server/main.go — v2 route block expanded from 5 to 12 routes.

Frontend: app/components/work-items-tree-config.tsx, app/components/WorkItemDetailPanel.tsx, app/components/useWorkItemFlowStates.ts, app/(user)/work-items/page.tsx — all /api/work-items URLs replaced with /api/v2/work-items.
feature_list: migration 016 — artefact_number_sequence for atomic number allocation
GET /api/v2/work-items/flow-states — flow state list for work type
Frontend fully switched to v2 endpoints (9 URL replacements across 4 files)
